title: T-028 — MS-001 Site Overview dashboard page (ms_dashboard) §10.1 MS-001
prompt:
# T-028 — MS-001 Site Overview dashboard page

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10.1 MS-001, §10C MS-001
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/dashboard.jsx:6-227 (ms_dashboard)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §ms_dashboard (BL-MS-01, BL-MS-06)

## Goal
Server Component page /(multi-site)/dashboard rendering 5-card KPI strip + collapsible network tree + active transfers feed + replication health mini-panel + site status widget. SWR 60s refresh on client.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/page.tsx (RSC) — parallel queries: cross_site_summary MV (T-027), active TOs (transfer_orders WHERE state IN ('shipped','in_transit')), replication_jobs counts by status, sites + buildings + lines joined for tree.
2. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/_components/dashboard-client.tsx ('use client') — SWR refreshInterval=60000.
3. Network tree: shadcn Collapsible per node. Map View: placeholder stub per BL-MS-01 (library decision pending — explicit comment).
4. KPI cards role-gated: restricted KPI values omitted from server response (not just hidden client-side) for non-admin.
5. Alert strip with dismiss persistence via dismissAlert Server Action writing user_alert_dismissals.
6. Tests: RTL parity + role-gated KPI omission + SWR 60s + tree collapse/expand + BL-MS-01 placeholder rendering + dismiss persistence.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/_components/dashboard-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/_components/kpi-strip.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/_components/site-tree.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/_components/active-transfers-feed.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/_actions/dismiss-alert.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/dashboard/_components/__tests__/dashboard-client.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given page renders, when compared to dashboard.jsx:6-227 (ms_dashboard), then 5-KPI strip + network tree + active transfers feed + replication health panel + site status widget all match — RTL parity + Playwright trace.
2. Given user role=warehouse_operator and KPI inventory_value is restricted, when page renders, then the value is absent from the server response (not just CSS hidden) and the card shows 'Restricted' placeholder.
3. Given SWR loop is mounted for 61s, when network log inspected, then a /api/dashboard/multi-site-summary refresh fires at ~60s.
4. Given alert is dismissed via dismissAlert action, when page reloads next session, then that alert is not shown again (persisted in user_alert_dismissals).
5. Given the Map View card renders, when inspected, then it shows the BL-MS-01 placeholder (text 'Map view pending library decision') — no map library imported.
6. Given the page is in withSiteContext(siteId=null) for super_admin, when KPI cards render, then aggregate across all sites is shown; given withSiteContext(siteId=X), only site_X KPIs appear.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + role-gated KPI omission + 60s SWR + dismiss persistence + BL-MS-01 placeholder + super_admin aggregate vs single-site before page exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run dashboard-client' + Playwright dashboard.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/dashboard.jsx:6-227 (ms_dashboard).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.
- Do not render restricted KPI values from server response — server omits them based on role.
- Do not implement map library (BL-MS-01 placeholder per Auditor A status note + translation-notes).
- Do not skip SWR 60s refreshInterval — UX contract.
- Do not bypass cross_site_summary MV (T-027) — direct table queries here would re-implement the aggregation.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Component dashboard page reading from cross_site_summary MV (T-027) — KPI strip + site tree + active transfers feed + replication health — 60s SWR refresh + role-gated KPIs + BL-MS-01 map placeholder.
